name: Combo Crush
description: Combo Crush is a fast-paced, addictive puzzle game where strategy meets satisfaction. Your goal is simple: find groups of two or more matching blocks and blast them away to reach the target score. But dont be fooled—as the levels progress, youll need sharp logic and clever moves to master the grid! How to Play: - Tap groups of matching colored blocks to remove them. - Reach the target score before the board gets stuck. - Earn points to buy helpful items in the Shop. - Complete levels to unlock bigger grids and new color challenges
